message:
fix(cass,distributed): correct moved value and update token estimation test (ft-2l9kn)

Fix seq_key use-after-move in distributed_persist_payload by cloning
before first insert, and update cass_export test to expect 4 tokens
(matching the corrected estimate_text_tokens from 1cd36ab3 which now
uses char-based estimation for non-whitespace strings).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
